name: magenda
description: MCP server that generates a deterministic, pixel-identical daily agenda PDF from a fixed docx template.
long_description: Magenda generates a daily agenda PDF laid out exactly like a fixed docx template. Tools only inject plain text into known slots or clone pre-formatted pages -- there is no AI-generated layout -- then a pinned LibreOffice headless build renders the result to PDF. Requires LibreOffice (`brew install --cask libreoffice`), which is not bundled.
